title: Osten Botanics
description: Import common flowers from Eastasian and Liszvoj-rim(Fi-World) to Minecraft
body:
Import common flowers from Eastasian and Liszvoj-rim(Novera Fictional world), or plants with their local impact to Minecraft
Atpresent, it includes the following plants：
- Apricot
- Armeniacus
- Camelia
- Gardenia
- Ginkgo
- Hibiscus
- Jasmine
- Laur
- Lily (White and Pink)
- Liquorice
- Lycoris
- Lotus
- Maple
- Magnolius
- Osmanthus
- Qeszwojtsa (Gvednosk in Novera)
- Rapseed
- Reimuhana (Touhou Project Meme)
- Rhododendron
- Tswasieskanca(Gvednosk in Novera)
![All blocks of this mod at version dev-0.0.7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd163674004b4889e482cee0eebf6ed3ce9ca511.png)
Additionally, this Mod also features three pieces of music created by XloenP. Both those are Gwednosk style fi-folk music. Two of them have been assigned to albums and can be obtained in the Creative Mode.
- Rogine Rilneth (Wheat in Winds)
- Gvedzramy Tniath (Falling and Treaded Osmanthus)

Notice: if you break it without silk touch, bushes here will not drop their original items.

Furthermore, when the cherry blossom leaves are destroyed, there will be a chance of cherry blossom dropping, which be able to be combined to form pink petals.

Currently, due to limited working hours, these flowers only have a few synthetic formulas, such as for brewing.
